scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build
scripts.sns:collect: node scripts/sns/scrape-instagram.mjs && node scripts/sns/clean-instagram.mjs && node scripts/sns/scrape-youtube.mjs && node scripts/sns/clean-youtube.mjs && node scripts/sns/append-trend.mjs
scripts.sns:clean: node scripts/sns/clean-instagram.mjs && node scripts/sns/clean-youtube.mjs && node scripts/sns/append-trend.mjs
